title: Stair ascending and descending aid device with flexible tension elements
abstract: The invention relates to a stair ascending and descending aid device designed to assist individuals with limited mobility. The device includes a foot platform with a height less than that of a standard stair step and a set of flexible tension elements connecting the foot platform to the user's upper body. These tension elements may include elastic components and can be held by hand or attached to the body, allowing the user to move the platform from one stair step to another. The platform can either move independently of the user's foot or synchronously with it.
claims: 1. A device for assisting in ascending and descending stairs, comprising: a foot platform with a height less than that of a stair step; a set of flexible tension elements connecting said foot platform to the user's upper body, including but not limited to the hands, shoulders, torso, and neck;
